superfan.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view of a sports/fandom superfan — wearing a team jersey (jersey outline and a number visible against the black body silhouette), mouth open mid-cheer. One arm is raised high overhead holding up an oversized foam '#1' pointing-finger glove. The big foam #1 finger glows bright gold and IS the at-a-glance identifier and the bright accent. Body otherwise pure black silhouette. No hat.

shill.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view of a sleazy salesman — slicked-back hair, wide-lapel suit jacket (a blazer, NOT a trenchcoat) held OPEN with both hands to flash the inner lining, where a row of four or five wristwatches is lined up for sale (a knockoff-watch huckster). A big toothy salesman grin implied in the head silhouette. The row of watches along the open jacket lining glows brighter teal-cyan and IS the at-a-glance identifier and the bright accent. Body otherwise pure black silhouette. No hat.

politics.wash: split crimson and navy, bruised purple where they meet
politics.accent: split half red and half blue
politics.silhouette: Chest-up view of an everyday partisan — an ordinary person facing roughly toward the viewer (head near front-on), wearing a baseball cap seen from the front so the bill points at the viewer. The cap is split vertically straight down its CENTER SEAM, front to back through the middle of the crown AND down the middle of the bill: the LEFT half is bright RED and the RIGHT half is bright BLUE, the dividing line running dead-center so both colored halves are clearly visible and equal in size. The whole cap glows brighter as the at-a-glance identifier and the bright accent (just as bleach-blonde hair identifies the superfan). The figure is talking with their hands — one hand raised mid-gesture as if making a point, mouth open mid-speech. NOT menacing, no hood, no raised fist — an animated everyday voter, not a militant. Body otherwise pure black silhouette.

cam_model.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a young goth woman with sharp asymmetric emo bangs falling across one eye, long swooping black hair, a thick black choker visible at the neck. Head tilted slightly, lips pursed blowing a kiss to the side. A small heart shape floats from her lips outward — the heart is the at-a-glance identifier and the bright accent.

farmer.silhouette: Chest-up view rendered as a MONKEY (chimpanzee) — a hunched faceless monkey/ape silhouette seated at a desk, leaning forward over a row of THREE phones lined up side-by-side on the desk. Clear primate silhouette: rounded ape skull, prominent brow ridge, longer arms, hunched primate shoulders, no clothing or just a plain bare body outline. Both hairy monkey hands hover over the phones, fingers poised to tap. The three phone screens all glow brighter, casting upward light onto the underside of the monkey's chin. The cluster of glowing phone screens is the at-a-glance identifier.

doomer.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a figure in a slouched pulled-down knit beanie, shoulders hunched forward, head tilted down, the silhouette reading as collapsed and weary. A lit cigarette dangles from where the mouth would be; the cigarette's ember glows brighter with a faint curl of smoke rising. The hunched silhouette + glowing ember is the at-a-glance identifier.

bot.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a boxy mechanical robot, rectangular blocky head (not round), rigid angular shoulders, no organic curves anywhere, faint mechanical seam lines suggested but not detailed. A single round camera-lens eye in the center of the rectangular head glows brighter. On top of the head, a small antenna with a tiny sphere on top. The boxy mechanical head + single glowing lens is the at-a-glance identifier. Distinctly non-human silhouette.

normal.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a perfectly average plain figure, basic short hair, plain t-shirt or simple sweater. Holding a coffee mug with both hands at chest height, the mug's open top facing the viewer. A gentle curl of steam rises from the mug. The mug's interior and the rising steam glow warm. The mug + relaxed posture is the at-a-glance identifier.

cam_model+doomer.wash: violet bruise, faded neon heartache, indigo washed with magenta
cam_model+doomer.silhouette: Chest-up 3/4 view — a figure in a pulled-down knit beanie (the doomer signal), shoulders hunched forward, head tilted down. Long swooping black hair pokes out from under the beanie with sharp asymmetric emo bangs falling across one of where its eyes would be, a thick black choker at the neck (the cam_model signal). A lit cigarette dangles from where the mouth would be, ember glowing brighter HOT-MAGENTA with a faint curl of smoke. A small magenta heart shape floats up alongside the smoke but is fading/cracked. The beanie + emo bangs + cigarette + faint cracked heart is the at-a-glance identifier — heartbroken loner.

cam_model+farmer.wash: synth-wave purple, neon midnight, cobalt bleeding into magenta

The goth-bangs monkey + three phones + magenta heart is the at-a-glance identifier — cam-model content farm.

The three phone screens cast pale upward light. The beanie + slouched posture + cigarette + three phones is the at-a-glance identifier — the exhausted content farmer.

doomer+politics.wash: ash-purple over split crimson and navy, twilight smog stained red and blue
doomer+politics.silhouette: Chest-up view of a weary, hunched figure, shoulders slouched forward and head tilted slightly down (the doomer signal), wearing a baseball cap seen from the front split straight down its CENTER SEAM — the LEFT half bright RED and the RIGHT half bright BLUE, both halves equal and the whole cap glowing (the politics signal). A lit cigarette dangles from the corner of the mouth, ember glowing with a faint curl of smoke. Mouth open in a tired, defeated rant.
